step.title: Create Trello board
step.action: Create a new Trello board named after the project.
Set board visibility and default settings.

step.title: Create lifecycle phase lists
step.action: Create lists matching Symphony lifecycle phases: Analysis, Planning, Solutioning, Implementation, Deployment, Done.
Order lists left-to-right to match the phase flow.

step.title: Create label scheme
step.action: Create labels matching workflow categories: agent, workflow, blocker, review.
Assign distinct colors to each label for visual clarity.

step.title: Add board members
step.action: Read project team configuration and add members to the board.
Assign appropriate roles (admin, normal) to each member.

step.title: Create initial cards
step.action: Create initial cards for active workflows and place them in the appropriate phase list.
Attach relevant labels to each card.

step.title: Produce setup report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with setup details.
